metadata.purpose: Source priority register for Jeju APP simulator phraseology contract

authority_order.title: 항공교통업무 운영 및 관리규정
authority_order.contract_role: Defines standard phraseology source priority and fallback order

authority_order.title: 항공교통관제절차
authority_order.contract_role: Primary domestic ATC procedures and phraseology source

authority_order.title: 무선통신매뉴얼
authority_order.contract_role: Radio communication, readback, callsign, and standard words source

authority_order.title: ICAO Doc 4444 PANS-ATM
authority_order.citation: Procedures for Air Navigation Services - Air Traffic Management
authority_order.contract_role: International fallback for ATC procedures and phraseology

authority_order.title: FAA JO 7110.65 Air Traffic Control
authority_order.contract_role: Last-resort fallback when domestic and ICAO sources do not resolve a command

authority_order.title: public_derived_training_dataset
authority_order.contract_role: Local phrase/use supplement; never overrides higher-priority sources

operational_rules.title: 항공안전법 시행규칙 제169조 비행속도의 유지 등
operational_rules.rule_summary: IAS 250 kt limit below 10000 ft MSL above 2500 ft AGL, with ATC approval and minimum safe speed exceptions
operational_rules.contract_use: Speed compliance and predictive deceleration before descending through 10000 ft
